title: The Summoning of Baby Blue
overview: Based on a legendary creepypasta, the film revolves around a terrifying bathroom ritual in which a girl must tell a ghost story in front of the mirror to summon the spirit of “Baby Blue.” This chilling premise unfolds into a series of short, spine-tingling tales that build tension and expand the mythology. Through the flickering lights of a haunted bathroom mirror and the whispered chant of “Baby Blue, Blue Baby,” a babysitting gig turns into a nightmarish summoning—where survival depends on confronting the past and escaping a mother’s wrath from beyond the grave.
